instructions.instruction: Use this skill when writing or reviewing Ecto database code to ensure consistent, idiomatic patterns.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when writing or reviewing Ecto database code to ensure consistent, idiomatic patterns.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Never call Repo from LiveViews or controllers** — all database operations belong in context modules
instructions.original_snippets: **Never call Repo from LiveViews or controllers** — all database operations belong in context modules
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Prefer non-bang functions** in application logic (`Repo.get/1`, `Repo.insert/1`) — use bang only in tests
instructions.original_snippets: **Prefer non-bang functions** in application logic (`Repo.get/1`, `Repo.insert/1`) — use bang only in tests
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Always preload associations** outside loops to prevent N+1 queries
instructions.original_snippets: **Always preload associations** outside loops to prevent N+1 queries
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Use Ecto.Multi for 2+ related operations** — never chain multiple Repo calls in sequence without a transaction
instructions.original_snippets: **Use Ecto.Multi for 2+ related operations** — never chain multiple Repo calls in sequence without a transaction
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Never combine schema changes and data backfill** in the same migration
instructions.original_snippets: **Never combine schema changes and data backfill** in the same migration
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Checkpoint:** Run Ecto query log observer in development to detect N+1 violations.
instructions.original_snippets: **Checkpoint:** Run Ecto query log observer in development to detect N+1 violations.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-ecto-conventions.
